rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a reorganization of the section to improve its structure and clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation, only flags uncertainty for one claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with one drift in the title and setup description.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors by making assertions without providing evidence.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
